2268430.name: Adepts Arena
2268430.description:
You are an Earth Adept of the Order, a soldier tasked with overseeing a vast and remote territory inhabited by sacred Earth Spirits and a variety of wild creatures. The Order exists to maintain the natural balance and protect the Earth Spirits from external threats. But that balance has been disrupted: the Artificers have gone rogue and built an army of automatons animated by Spiritual Energy and intricate clockwork frames. These Constructs scour the land, seeking rare materials and actively hunting Earth Spirits to extract their energy.

Will you have the strength and courage to protect the balance and save the Spirits?

  • Use your earth mastery to throw rocks at your enemies, build structures that protect you, and reach otherwise inaccessible places.

  • Learn new powers as you progress through your adventure and achieve legendary mastery in earth control.

  • Travel through an epic adventure to protect the sacred Spirits or fight in intense arenas to defend your allies from waves of enemies in the sandbox levels.

  • Play both on flat-screen and VR through two different modes of experiencing earth control: FPS-like in the PC version and as a martial arts simulation in VR.

  • Discover the mysteries hidden throughout the world and marvel at the strange creatures and entities that inhabit the universe of Adepts Arena.
2268430.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
